# TableSeatingPlannerFitted

## Summary

The compact card formats for the Table Seating Planner. One component renders all the fitted breakpoints, switched by container queries: a badge (✦ mark, event title, guest count), a strip (title, venue or table count, and a seated tag), a tile (a LayoutPreview floor-plan hero above the title and stats), and a wide card (title, date, venue, and stat pills beside a floor-plan panel). The title falls back to "Seating Plan", and the seated count is de-duplicated across tables. When the planner has no linked theme (`cardInfo.theme`), a `.tsp-default-theme` class pins the semantic tokens to the package's Parisian palette so app-level defaults can't restyle the card; with a linked theme the class is omitted and the theme's tokens flow through.

## Import

```js
import { TableSeatingPlannerFitted } from '../components/tsp';
```

## Template Usage

Not typically invoked directly — the card definition assigns it as both the fitted and embedded formats in `table-seating-planner.gts`:

```js
TableSeatingPlanner.embedded = TableSeatingPlannerFitted;
TableSeatingPlanner.fitted = TableSeatingPlannerFitted;
```
